content: Hi, I'm Dana Moore, and I'm a wedding planner running my own agency. I've been feeling really overwhelmed with work lately and I'm trying to find ways to prioritize my health and wellness.

Hello, Dana! It's great that you're recognizing the importance of prioritizing your health and wellness, especially as a busy wedding planner. What specific challenges are you facing, and how do you think you can make time for self-care?
I've been working non-stop for months, and I've barely had time to take care of myself. I've been trying to start a new online course, but it's hard to find the time and energy to focus on it.

It can be tough to balance work and personal life, especially when you're passionate about your job, Dana. Starting an online course is a great idea, though – what's the course about, and how do you think it will help you in your career as a wedding planner?

The course is about marketing and social media management, and I think it will help me grow my business and reach more clients. I've been trying to learn more about SEO and content creation, but it's a lot to take in.

Marketing and social media management are essential skills for any business, Dana. It's great that you're taking the initiative to learn more about these topics. Have you considered hiring any help or outsourcing some tasks to free up more time for yourself and your online course?
I've been thinking about hiring a virtual assistant, but I'm not sure if it's the right time. I've also been trying to prioritize my physical health by knitting and practicing yoga.

Knitting and yoga are wonderful ways to relax and unwind, Dana! It's great that you're making time for activities that bring you joy and help you de-stress. Have you considered incorporating any other self-care practices, like meditation or spending time in nature?
I love spending time outdoors, and I've been trying to get to the beach more often. I live in San Diego, so it's easy to take advantage of the beautiful weather and scenery.
San Diego is a wonderful place to live, Dana! The beach can be very therapeutic, and it's great that you're making time to enjoy it. Do you have a favorite beach or outdoor spot in the area?
I love La Jolla Cove, it's so picturesque and peaceful. I've been trying to get there at least once a week to clear my head and relax.

La Jolla Cove is a beautiful spot, Dana! It's great that you're prioritizing your mental health and taking time to relax and unwind. Remember to be patient with yourself and take things one step at a time – you got this!
Thanks for the encouragement, I needed that. I'm hoping to launch my online course by the end of March, so I'm trying to stay focused and motivated.

You're welcome, Dana! It's exciting that you're working towards a specific goal, and I'm sure you'll do great. Remember to take care of yourself along the way, and don't hesitate to reach out if you need any help or advice.
I will, thanks again for the chat. I'm feeling more inspired to prioritize my health and wellness now.
You're welcome, Dana! It was great chatting with you, and I hope you have a wonderful day. Good luck with your online course and your business – you're going to do great things!
